positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial botanical illustration featuring intertwined silver and deep sapphire blue glowing vines, crescent moons, and nebula dust surrounding a central, glowing lotus flower. The style should be a highly detailed, ethereal neo-Art Nouveau blend with strong geometric elements, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep midnight blue, metallic silver, glowing cyan, and hints of magenta. Composition must be perfectly centered, maximizing negative space around the main floral motif to ensure print scalability. Clean lines, crisp silhouettes, magical glow effects, high contrast vector quality, Zentangle inspired details.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, amateur drawing, poor anatomy, grayscale, muddy colors, messy composition, photographic, 3d render, logo, brand name
